manifest.name: Spatial Task Graph

name: Spatial Task Graph

releases.author: CccJhuan
releases.description:
🎉 1.1.1: The "Center Stage & Performance Pro" Update

This update transforms Spatial Task Graph from a sidebar utility into a full-fledged, high-performance productivity workspace. The graph now opens in the center workspace, interactions are smoother, and disk syncing is optimized for a lag-free canvas experience.

🏠 Center Stage: Spatial Freedom

Default to Center Tab: The graph now opens in the Main Workspace by default, giving your tasks the infinite canvas they deserve.

Smart Focus Activation: New revealLeaf logic ensures the graph tab is focused and rendered immediately when opened, reducing UI flicker.

⚡ Pro Performance

Disk I/O Debouncing: Save operations now use an 800ms debounce. Dragging nodes and moving around the canvas no longer triggers constant file writes.

Sidebar Memoization: The "My Tasks" sidebar now uses memoized task grouping, reducing unnecessary recalculation with large task sets.

Efficient Re-renders: Removed redundant node updates during drag operations so React Flow can handle positioning more efficiently.

🧠 Smarter Layout & Personalization

New Toggle: Auto-fit After Layout: Added a setting to control whether the graph zooms out after auto-layout.

On by default: Shows the full graph after layout.

Off: Keeps your current zoom level and position, useful when focusing on a specific branch.

Deterministic Barycenter Engine: Layout remains predictable and idempotent while organizing task trees, text notes, and isolated nodes without overlaps.

🪨 Stability Improvements

Block-ID Persistence: Connections now use native block IDs (^xxxxxx), keeping graph links stable even when files are renamed or task text changes.

Production-Grade Code: Fixed TypeScript and ESLint issues around floating promises and unsafe assignments.

✨ UX Refinement

Dedicated Navigation: Each node now includes a dedicated ↗ [filename] button, preventing accidental file opening while dragging cards.

Robust Build Pipeline: Rebuilt the esbuild configuration for faster development and cleaner production builds.

📥 How to Install/Update

Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below.

Replace the existing files in your .obsidian/plugins/spatial-task-graph/ folder.

Reload the app or toggle the plugin off and on in the community plugins settings.

releases.author: CccJhuan
releases.description:
🎉 v1.1.0: The "Center Stage & Performance Pro" Update!
This major update transforms Spatial Task Graph from a sidebar utility into a full-fledged, high-performance productivity workspace. We’ve unlocked the canvas by moving it to the center of your vault and decoupled the UI from disk I/O to ensure a lag-free experience.

🏠 Center Stage: Spatial Freedom
Default to Center Tab: The graph now opens in the Main Workspace (Center Tab) by default. No more squinting at a cramped sidebar—your tasks now have the infinite canvas they deserve.

Smart Focus Activation: Using the new revealLeaf logic, the plugin ensures the tab is instantly focused and rendered when called, eliminating UI flicker.

⚡ Pro Performance (Zero-Lag Experience)
Disk I/O Debouncing: We implemented an 800ms intelligent debounce for all save operations. When dragging nodes or panning the canvas, the plugin no longer blocks the main thread with constant file writes. It waits for you to pause before syncing to disk, keeping your interactions at a steady 60fps.

Sidebar Memoization: The "My Tasks" sidebar has been optimized with useMemo. Even with hundreds of tasks, the status categorization (In Progress/Pending/Backlog) only re-calculates when necessary, significantly reducing CPU overhead.

Efficient Re-renders: Removed redundant setNodes calls during drag operations, allowing React Flow to handle positioning natively and efficiently.

🧠 Smarter Layout & Personalization
New Toggle: Auto-fit After Layout: Added a new setting in the plugin tab.

On (Default): Automatically zooms out to show the full graph after a layout.

Off: Keeps your current zoom level and position—perfect for those who want to stay focused on a specific branch while organizing.

Deterministic Barycenter Engine: The layout remains idempotent and smart, neatly organizing task trees, text notes, and "islands" without overlaps.

🪨 Rock-Solid Stability
Block-ID Persistence: Connections now automatically inject native Obsidian Block-IDs (^xxxxxx). Rename your files or edit task text as much as you like; your graph connections will remain permanently intact.

Production-Grade Code: Fixed all ESLint and TypeScript "Floating Promise" and "Unsafe Assignment" errors. The plugin is now built on a strictly typed, reliable foundation.

✨ UX Refinement
Dedicated Navigation: Each node features a dedicated ↗ [filename] button. This prevents accidental file opening while dragging cards and ensures precise navigation to your notes.

Robust Build Pipeline: A completely rebuilt esbuild configuration ensures faster development and cleaner production builds.

📥 How to Install/Update
Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from the assets below.

Replace the existing files in your .obsidian/plugins/spatial-task-graph/ folder.

Reload Obsidian or toggle the plugin off and on in the community plugins settings.

releases.author: CccJhuan
releases.description:
### 🎉 Initial Release of Spatial Task Graph!

Transform your linear Obsidian tasks into a dynamic, interactive infinite canvas. 

**✨ Core Features in this version:**
- **Smart Layout:** Auto-arrange your task graph with a single click.
- **Interactive Kanban Sidebar:** Drag and drop tasks to change their status instantly.
- **Drag-to-Create:** Seamlessly create new linked tasks directly on the canvas.
- **Two-way Sync:** Changes in the graph instantly update your Markdown files with Tasks-plugin compatible timestamps.
- **Multi-Board Management:** Switch between different projects using tag and path filters.

**📥 How to install manually:**
1. Download the `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` files from the assets below.
2. Place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-spatial-task-graph/` folder.
3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.
releases.name: 1.0.0 - Initial Release (首发版本)
